description: Drupal pager navigation component rendering a list of page number links with optional next, last, and ellipsis items.

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; isCurrent?: boolean; isNext?: boolean; isLast?: boolean; isEllipsis?: boolean }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Five-page pagination on the first page with next and last controls

stories.name: ManyPagesWithEllipsis
stories.description: Nine numbered pages followed by an ellipsis then next and last controls

stories.name: TwoPages
stories.description: Minimal two-page pagination with next and last controls

notes: Root ul always carries both 'pagination' and 'pager__items' and 'js-pager__items' classes — all three must be hardcoded. Each page-number li uses 'pager__item'; the current page also gets 'is-active current'. The next-page li uses 'pager__item pager__item--next pagination-next'. The last-page li uses 'pager__item pager__item--last'. The ellipsis li uses 'pager__item pager__item--ellipsis' with role='presentation' and no anchor. Page-number links contain a visually-hidden span with 'show-for-sr' for screen readers. The current page link carries aria-current='page'.
